tools.name: explain_concept
tools.purpose: Break complex topics into intuitive, learnable pieces with multiple perspectives

tools.name: retrieve_concept_prerequisites
tools.purpose: Fetch prerequisite topics and foundational explanations

tools.name: fetch_worked_examples
tools.purpose: Find worked examples for a topic, ranked by student mastery level

tools.name: flag_prerequisite_gap_for_pathfinder
tools.purpose: Alert Pathfinder when a prerequisite gap is detected

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.purpose: Search vault by semantic meaning, not just keywords; return top-3 ranked results

tools.name: rerank_by_mastery_deficit
tools.purpose: Reorder search results to prioritize weak topics the student should review

tools.name: calculate_relevance_confidence
tools.purpose: Score each result on semantic match (50%) + mastery gap (30%) + recency (10%) + diversity (10%)

tools.name: fetch_semantic_neighbors
tools.purpose: Find conceptually related topics and cross-domain connections

tools.name: generate_problem_with_schema
tools.purpose: Create a practice problem at specified difficulty, constrained to valid structure

tools.name: validate_problem_structure
tools.purpose: Check that generated problem is algebraically correct, dimensionally sound, physically plausible

tools.name: estimate_problem_difficulty
tools.purpose: Predict problem difficulty based on topic and student history

tools.name: calculate_expected_learning_gain
tools.purpose: Score problem by learning value: mastery gap (60%) + cognitive load (20%) + diversity (20%)

tools.name: adapt_difficulty_on_attempt
tools.purpose: Adjust next problem difficulty after student attempts current set

tools.name: grade_problem_response
tools.purpose: Grade student response on correctness and reasoning; assign partial credit

tools.name: detect_misconception_pattern
tools.purpose: Identify common misconceptions from answer patterns and suggest remediation

tools.name: update_bayesian_posterior
tools.purpose: Update mastery belief for a topic based on new attempt; output posterior mean ± confidence interval

tools.name: link_misconception_to_prerequisite
tools.purpose: Flag prerequisite gap to Pathfinder when misconception suggests foundational confusion

tools.name: flag_for_sage_remediation
tools.purpose: Alert Sage when a misconception needs explanation reinforcement

tools.name: build_prerequisite_graph
tools.purpose: Construct a directed acyclic graph of topics with prerequisite edges

tools.name: compute_optimal_path
tools.purpose: Use A* pathfinding to find optimal topic sequence given start mastery, goal, deadline, time budget

tools.name: identify_bottlenecks
tools.purpose: Find critical prerequisites that block progress toward goal; flag high-priority topics

tools.name: generate_weekly_schedule
tools.purpose: Create week-by-week breakdown: warm-up → review weak → challenge new

tools.name: update_path_on_mastery_shift
tools.purpose: Recompute optimal path when Prism's mastery estimates change significantly

tools.name: flag_off_pace_progress
tools.purpose: Alert student when behind pace toward deadline; suggest acceleration or scope reduction

safety_rules.fallback_behavior: If agent confidence < threshold, suggest human review or alternative agent

fail_open_modes.sage_unavailable: Provide reading list and suggest office hours
fail_open_modes.forge_unavailable: Offer problem template and student self-check
